signals.headline: Blue Peak Resources Hires New Financial Consultant
signals.summary: Blue Peak Resources Hires New Financial Consultant jnickel Tue, 05/05/2026 - 08:54 Palm Beach Gardens, FL — May 4, 2026 — Blue Peak Resources, a consulting firm specializing in propane and fuel oil mergers and acquisitions, has announced that Maria Ruxy Abisaid, CPA, has joined the company as a financial consultant. signals.headline: Blue Peak Resources adds Maria Ruxy Abisaid as financial consultant
signals.summary:
Abisaid joins Blue Peak Resources as the company continues to expand its services to clients in the propane and fuel oil industries.
